titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of NRS GD45/13/225

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=178 status=live modified=2017-07-07 12:16:15.524087+00 | translation moa=179 status=live modified=2017-07-07 12:14:11.662629+00

p.cl: Ricardus dei gratia Sancti Andree minister humilis . dilectis in Christo sancte matris ecclesie filiis salutem et episcopalem benedictionem.

Noscat uestra fraternitas nos
concessisse et carta nostra confirmasse omnes ecclesias quas in nostra diocesi rex DauiD . et rex Malcolmus . et bone memorie Rodbertus episcopus . et Ernaldus episcopus . uel
alii christi fideles in elemosinam perpetuam dederunt ecclesie Sancte Crucis de edenesburch . scilicet ecclesiam de castello cum saletunia . et omnibus aliis eius
appendiciis . et ecclesiam Sancti Cudberti . cum duabus carucatis terre . et cum aliis rectitudinibus suis . et ecclesiam de Crostorphin cum duabus bouatis . et sex
acris terre . et ceteris rebus ad eam iuste pertinentibus . et ecclesiam de hereth . cum duabus carucatis terre . et ceteris appendiciis . et unam salinam cum . uiginti .
septem acris terre . et ecclesiam de uilla Leuing . cum dimidia carucata terre . et omnibus aliis que ad eam iuste pertinent . et ecclesiam de kinel .
cum una carucata terre . et decima molendini . et salinarum eiusdem uille . et ecclesiam de hamara cum omnibus appenticiis suis . et ecclesiam de karreden .
cum terra que iuste ad eam pertinet . et omnibus rectitudinibus suis . et ecclesiam de Trauernent cum terra et omnibus ad eam recte pertinentibus . et ecclesiam de
Bathchet cum una carucata terre . et omnibus ad eam iuste pertinentibus . et omnia quecumque prefata ecclesia ex alicuius donacione iuste possidet . sicut
carta regis . DauiD . et carta regis Malcolmi . et carta Rodberti episcopi . et carta Ærnaldi episcopi . testantur et confirmant . Uolumus itaque et assensu tocius capituli
nostri concedimus . et concedendo confirmamus . predictam Sancte Crucis ecclesiam . uniuersas prenominatas ecclesias . ceterasque suas possessiones . cum omnibus
rectitudinibus suis liberas tenere et quietas . et ab omni exactione tutas et inconcussas . saluo iure episcopali .

His testibus . Andrea archidiacono .
Aiulfo decano . Rodberto capellano fratre episcopi . Gaufrido presbitero de laswade . Rodberto canonico sancti Andree . Alexandro capellano episcopi . Magistro
Herberto . Magistro abraham . clericis episcopi.
Richard, by the grace of God a humble servant of Saint Andrew, to his beloved in Christ, the sons of Holy Mother Church, sends greeting and episcopal blessing.

Let your fraternity know that we have granted, and by his charter made firm, all the churches that are in our diocese which King David, and King Malcolm, and Bishops Robert of good memory, and Bishop Arnald, or other faithful of Christ, gave in perpetual alms to the church of Holyrood in Edinburgh; that is to say, the church of [Edinburgh] castle with Saughton, and all its other dependencies; the church of St Cuthbert [in Edinburgh] with two ploughgates of land and its other rights; and the church of Corstorphine with two oxgangs, and six acres of land, and the rest of the things rightfully belonging to it; the church of Airth with two ploughgates of land, and the rest of its dependencies, and a saltpan with twenty-seven acres of land; and the church of Livingston, with half a ploughgate of land, and all other things which rightfully belong to it; and the church of Kinneil, with one ploughgate of land, the teind of the mill, and the saltworks of that toun; and the church of Whitekirk with all its dependencies; and the church of Carriden, with the land which rightfully belongs to it, and all its rights; and the church of Tranent, with land and everything rightfully belonging to it; and the church of Bathgate, with one ploughgate of land, and everything rightfully belonging to it; and all things which that church rightfully possesses from any donation, as the charter of King David, and the charter of King Malcolm, and the charter of Bishop Robert, and the charter of Bishop Arnald attest and confirm. We therefore wish, and with the assent of all our chapter we grant, and by granting we confirm, that the aforesaid church of the Holyrood is to hold all the aforenamed churches, and the rest of its possessions, with all its rights free and quit, and protected and unharmed by any exaction. Reserving episcopal right.

With these witnesses: Andrew, archdeacon; Aiulf, dean; Robert, chaplain and the bishop’s brother; Geoffrey, priest of Lasswade; Robert, canon of St Andrews; Alexander, the bishop’s chaplain; Master Herbert [and] Master Abraham, the bishop’s clerks.
